creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 181852
libical update

Update devel/libical to version 2.0 which I need for mail/claws-mail-vcalendar
I've build tested all consumers and all build fine, except devel/libical-glib which seems to not support libical 2.0 and last activity in their repo was 2
years ago.

Note that this patch does not contain PORTREVISION bumps which are needed.
